channel.title: NeuralBroker Lab — Engineering Notes
channel.description: Engineering notes by Abdulla Sajad (neuralbroker) on AI systems, fine-tuning, production ML, and infrastructure.

item.title: My projects and learnings so far
item.description: Walkthrough of BlitzKode, EsenceLab, Lexora AI, and SentinelML — design decisions and what I'd do differently.

item.title: Fine-tuning small models is mostly data work
item.description: Lessons from building BlitzKode — why SFT data quality matters more than model architecture.

item.title: Your ML system will fail in production. Plan for it.
item.description: SentinelML postmortem — drift detection, retraining, and why monitoring beats model cards.

item.title: Neurosymbolic AI in military systems
item.description: Reading notes from a seminar paper on neurosymbolic AI approaches.
